jobs.title: Emotional Reels Video Editor - Individual Editors Only
jobs.description:
I’m looking for a seasoned video editor who can turn my scripts into short, emotionally-charged reels designed to boost customer engagement across several unrelated businesses. Because each brand is different, I won’t be sharing their niches; instead, I need someone confident enough to craft a compelling story without that extra context.

Here’s how we’ll work together: I deliver a concise script or outline for each reel, you source or shoot any raw clips and images required, then weave everything into a polished, heartfelt video that feels authentic and keeps viewers watching to the very end.

jobs.title: IRC 2021 Residential Renovation Plans
jobs.description:
I need detailed engineer permit plans for a residential renovation in New Orleans, compliant with IRC 2021. 

Key requirements:
- Renovation of both interior and exterior
- Areas include kitchen, bathrooms, entire home, electrical, plumbing, etc.

Ideal skills and experience:
- Expertise in IRC 2021 codes
- Experience with New Orleans residential projects
- Proficient in creating detailed, code-compliant permit plans
- Knowledge of local zoning laws and regulations

jobs.title: Skincare Product Grid Webpage
jobs.description:
I’m building an online storefront dedicated to skin-care items and I want the shopping experience to feel as effortless as browsing Amazon. The page should open with a clean, responsive grid that lets visitors view multiple products at a glance, then dive into any item for a rich, image-driven description. High-quality photos, ingredient highlights, and usage tips all need to sit naturally within that product detail section so shoppers can make quick, confident decisions.

jobs.title: Editing video
jobs.description:
I have a finished cut that runs a little over fifteen minutes and now needs professional color work to bring it to life. The footage was shot on a mirrorless camera in a flat profile; right now it looks washed-out and inconsistent from scene to scene.  

Your task is straightforward: grade the entire piece so brightness, contrast, and overall color tone feel cinematic yet natural. I do not need any additional editing, effects, or transitions at this stage—only a cohesive, polished grade that matches shots, smooths skin tones, and keeps blacks from crushing.  

Please work in DaVinci Resolve, A

jobs.description:

jobs.title: Part-Time Technical Writer Needed
jobs.description:
I need an experienced technical writer who can step in on a part-time basis and turn complex concepts into clear, engaging content. Most assignments will revolve around how-to guides, product documentation, and short technical articles aimed at a non-expert audience, so your ability to strike the right balance between accuracy and readability is vital.

jobs.title: Amazon KDP Formatting & Launch -- 2
jobs.description:
My English-language educational ebook is complete in Word, but I need a Kindle-ready makeover and a smooth release on Amazon. Here’s what I’m looking for:

• Interior formatting: convert the Word manuscript into a clean EPUB that passes KDP preview, with working table of contents, consistent styles, and error-free typography.  
• Cover assistance: I have a rough concept; I need you to polish it into a professional, upload-ready front-and-back cover that meets Amazon’s exact dimensions and file specs.  
• Upload & setup: handle the KDP dashboard entry, ISBN settings (if needed), pricing regions
